name: Country French Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Meaty chicken (breast halves, thighs, drumsticks)
1 medium Onion, cut into small wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the skin from the chicken.
2. Rinse the chicken and pat it dry.
3. Coat a large cold skillet with non-stick spray.
4. Preheat the skillet over medium heat.
5. Brown the chicken on all sides in the hot skillet.
6. Drain any excess fat from the skillet.
7. Season the chicken lightly with salt and pepper.
8. Add mushrooms, celery, white wine, carrots, onion, garlic, bay leaf, parsley, and thyme to the skillet.
9. Bring the mixture to a boil.
10. Reduce heat and cover. Simmer for 35 to 40 minutes or until the chicken is tender and no longer pink.
11. Discard the bay leaf.
12. Transfer the chicken and vegetables to a platter and keep warm.
13. To make the sauce, return any remaining liquid to the skillet and boil it down until reduced to about half a cup.
14. Pour the sauce over the chicken and vegetables.
Makes 6 servings.
Food Exchanges per serving: 3 Lean Meat Exchanges + 1 Vegetable Exchange CHO: 68; PRO: 22: FAT: 6g; CAL: 187.
